data.body: CBS announced its fall 2026 schedule today, and Survivor 51 and The Amazing Race 39 will share Wednesday nights. No other reality TV show is on its returning, midseason, or new show list for 2026-2027, which probably means the end of The Road. (America's Culinary Cup is still airing.)

data.body:
Yeah, I blame the Beatles basically. They invented and became the template of a band that does everything themselves from composing to recording.

Then I think the US counterculture ran with the idea of authenticity against The Man.

And poor punk rockers ate up the DIY ethos.
